query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN signer_cpf IS NOT NULL AND signer_cpf != '' AND LENGTH(signer_cpf) < 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unencrypted_cpf, SUM(CASE WHEN signer_email IS NOT NULL AND signer_email != '' AND LENGTH(signer_email) < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unencrypted_email, SUM(CASE WHEN signer_name IS NOT NULL AND signer_name != '' AND LENGTH(signer_name) < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unencrypted_name, SUM(CASE WHEN raw_payload IS NOT NULL AND raw_payload != '' AND LEFT(raw_payload, 1) = '{' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unencrypted_payload FROM clicksign_contracts;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3VZFt7SKQu8xeVW.035f96cf6ffd --database mdqtoTdxUgyafXfA49s4Hx --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN signer_cpf IS NOT NULL AND signer_cpf != '' AND LENGTH(signer_cpf) < 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unencrypted_cpf, SUM(CASE WHEN signer_email IS NOT NULL AND signer_email != '' AND LENGTH(signer_email) < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unencrypted_email, SUM(CASE WHEN signer_name IS NOT NULL AND signer_name != '' AND LENGTH(signer_name) < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unencrypted_name, SUM(CASE WHEN raw_payload IS NOT NULL AND raw_payload != '' AND LEFT(raw_payload, 1) = '{' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unencrypted_payload FROM clicksign_contracts;
